R4-FM-01: compare feeling of fluency with actual retrieval evidence
one evidence statement required before self-evaluation is accepted
use delayed checks to challenge overconfidence
R4-FM-02: short decision menu for pace strategy or help options
pick one adaptive move and justify it
reinforce change based on evidence rather than passive persistence
R4-FM-03: limit changes to one variable at a time
compare the new decision against the triggering evidence
stabilize the routine before further adjustments
